overall.description: First-person gameplay footage following an NPC through a commercial building entrance, down a neon-lit corridor with red carpet, and into an elevator. The scene transitions from outdoor urban environment to indoor industrial-style hallway and finally into a wooden-paneled elevator for an ascent.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building entrance with security checkpoint

events.description: moving from outdoor sidewalk into covered building entrance
following NPC through doorway into interior corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward building entrance following a person in white coat

notable_agents.action: person in white lab coat walking ahead into the building

entered.detail: large dark entranceway with glass and metal frame
futuristic security checkpoint with glowing green screen
gray concrete pavement leading to entrance

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a modern commercial building entrance from the sidewalk. A security barrier with a glowing green screen stands to the right as the player follows an NPC in a white coat toward the dark entranceway.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with red carpet and side reception desks

events.description: lighting shifts to darker ambiance with red neon accent lights along walls
slowing down as approaching elevator gate at corridor end

agents.ego_description: walking down long corridor passing reception desks with staff members on either side

notable_agents.action: reception staff member in yellow shirt standing behind counter

entered.detail: high ceiling with vertical light strips and industrial beams
dark red carpet with illuminated yellow border lines
dark brick walls with vertical slit windows
long dark counter with staff behind and red accent lighting
metal scissor gate at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a long, dimly lit corridor with red carpet and yellow accent lines. Dark brick walls flank the sides with reception desks illuminated by red neon lights, while the corridor leads toward a metal elevator gate at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator interior with wooden walls and tribal masks

events.description: metal elevator gate opens and player enters the cabin
pressing button for floor 01 on the elevator control panel

agents.ego_description: stepping into elevator, looking at decorative masks, then turning to press floor button

entered.detail: small enclosed cabin with dark wooden panel walls
three tribal masks with red and yellow accents hanging on back wall
digital control panel with illuminated floor buttons

segments.scene_description: The elevator gate opens to reveal a small cabin with wooden walls and decorative tribal masks. The player enters, turns to the control panel on the left, and presses the button for the first floor.

events.description: elevator doors close and cabin begins ascending upward

agents.ego_description: standing still facing elevator doors as the cabin ascends to upper floor

entered.detail: closed metal elevator doors with reflective surface

segments.scene_description: The elevator doors close and the cabin ascends upward. The player faces the closed metal doors while the control panel is now visible to the right side of the frame. The wooden walls remain visible as the elevator continues its steady climb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright urban sidewalk into the moody, enclosed depths of a commercial building and finally into a rising elevator. It begins by following an NPC in a white coat past a glowing green security barrier and through a dark entranceway. As the camera moves inside, the environment shifts into a long, dimly lit corridor where red neon lights illuminate reception desks against dark brick walls and a red-carpeted floor. The scene then opens as the camera reaches the end of the hall and enters a small wooden elevator cabin adorned with tribal masks. Finally, after the player presses a button on the control panel, the metal doors close and the cabin ascends, leaving the corridor behind.
